blog_title: T-Shirt Shrinkage Test for Bulk Orders — How 6% Shrinkage Rejected a ₹45K 200 GSM Order
caption:
₹45,000 order. Completely rejected. 😬

A printing business ordered 300 plain t-shirts, 200 GSM. After one wash? XL shrank to Large. 6% shrinkage killed the entire batch.

Here's the trap: GSM only tells weight—not how much it'll shrink. Pre-shrunk treatment matters. Always wash a sample before bulk ordering.

Save this post if you're sourcing next time 👇
